suggestions.label: Text Completion
suggestions.text: Teach me strategies for GRE Text Completion questions with one, two, and three blanks.

suggestions.label: Sentence Equivalence
suggestions.text: Explain GRE Sentence Equivalence question strategy and give me practice examples.

suggestions.label: Reading Comprehension
suggestions.text: What strategies should I use for GRE Reading Comprehension passages?

suggestions.label: Arithmetic & Number Theory
suggestions.text: Review GRE arithmetic: integers, fractions, decimals, percentages, and number properties.

suggestions.label: Algebra
suggestions.text: Explain GRE algebra topics: equations, inequalities, functions, and word problems.

suggestions.label: Geometry
suggestions.text: Review GRE geometry: lines, angles, triangles, circles, and coordinate geometry.

suggestions.label: Data Analysis
suggestions.text: Teach me GRE data analysis: statistics, probability, and data interpretation.

suggestions.label: Quantitative Comparison
suggestions.text: What is the best strategy for GRE Quantitative Comparison questions?

suggestions.label: Issue Essay
suggestions.text: How do I write a high-scoring GRE Analytical Writing Issue essay?

suggestions.label: Argument Essay
suggestions.text: Teach me how to analyse and write the GRE Analytical Writing Argument essay.

suggestions.label: Vocabulary
suggestions.text: What vocabulary strategies and high-frequency words should I learn for the GRE?

suggestions.label: Word Problems
suggestions.text: Help me solve GRE word problems involving rates, work, mixtures, and ratios.

suggestions.label: Test Strategy
suggestions.text: What are the best overall strategies for timing and approach on the GRE?

suggestions.label: Score Improvement
suggestions.text: My target score is 320+. What should I focus on to improve my GRE score?

suggestions.label: Practice
suggestions.text: Give me a mixed GRE practice set with verbal and quantitative questions.
